title: Patth
subTitle: Avi, a young man, murders Bhullar, a local gangster, along with his friends after his sister, Nandini, is killed. Later, they surrender themselves to Bhullar's boss and eventually join his gang.

title: Fight Club
subTitle: Unhappy with his capitalistic lifestyle, a white-collared insomniac forms an underground fight club with Tyler, a careless soap salesman. Soon, their venture spirals down into something sinister.

title: Shor in the City
subTitle: In the city of Mumbai, an NRI businessman, a minor criminal and an aspiring cricketer grapple with life-changing choices during the chaotic period of the festival of Ganesh Chaturthi.

title: Vighnaharta Shree Siddhivinayak
subTitle: Successful businessman Manav Mehta bears a huge loss in his business when his personal life is in turmoil. To overcome his problems he must seek blessings from Shree Siddhivinayak.

title: Hum To Mohabbat Karega
subTitle: A hotel waiter named Raju becomes entangled in danger when his attempt to impress news anchor Geeta by claiming to witness a murder leads to unexpected twists.

title: Pink
subTitle: After being molested, Minal, along with her friends, tries to file an FIR against a politician's nephew. When the subsequent case gets rigged, Deepak, a retired lawyer, helps them to fight the case.

title: EMI: Liya Hai to Chukana Padega
subTitle: Sattar Bhai runs a collection agency called Good Luck Recovery in Mumbai's Bhendi Bazar area. Famous for his notoriety, he uses unconventional methods to make four defaulters repay their debts.

title: One Two Three
subTitle: Three strangers with the same name, Laxminarayan, travel to Pondicherry for their work. However, chaos ensues when they are mistaken for each other as they stay in the same hotel.

title: Lajja
subTitle: Trapped within the confines of a male-dominated society, four courageous women fight their battles, each unrelated yet resonant with the others.

title: Tapish
subTitle: After her husband dies on the night of their wedding, Lajwanti is forced to live out her life as a widow. But even when she starts to take an interest in someone else, her past becomes an obstacle.

title: Tapish
subTitle: After her husband dies on the night of their wedding, Lajwanti is forced to live out her life as a widow. But even when she starts to take an interest in someone else, her past becomes an obstacle.

title: Paagalpan
subTitle: Sameer, the son of an industrialist, and Roma, a girl struggling to build a career, fall in love. However, their love is tested when their families disapprove of their relationship.

title: Filhaal
subTitle: When Sia watches her best friend Rewa slip into depression because of her inability to bear a child, she offers to be her surrogate. Trouble brews when jealousy finds its way into their relationship.

title: Lajja
subTitle: Trapped within the confines of a male-dominated society, four courageous women fight their battles, each unrelated yet resonant with the others.

title: Sun Zarra
subTitle: Trisha and Rohit's chance encounter sparks a love connection between them, until a tragic accident tests their love and commitment for each other.

title: Provoked
subTitle: After years of abuse, Kiranjit incinerates her husband, Deepak, and goes to prison. There, her cellmate, Ronnie, asks her stepbrother to pursue an appeal, hoping to find real justice for Kiranjit.

title: Hum To Mohabbat Karega
subTitle: A hotel waiter named Raju becomes entangled in danger when his attempt to impress news anchor Geeta by claiming to witness a murder leads to unexpected twists.

title: Dost
subTitle: Maanav befriends Gopichand, a reformed thief, and helps him secure a job to turn his life around. However, Maanav suddenly disappears and returns just in time to support Gopichand during a crisis.

title: Suhaag
subTitle: College friends Ajay and Raj always play pranks on each other and then get into trouble. One day, Ajay needs his birth certificate for his passport, but he is shocked to find out his real name.

title: Kya Kool Hain Hum 3
subTitle: A man, kicked out of his house, begins to work as an adult film actor in Thailand. However, things take a turn when he falls in love with a girl from a conservative family.

title: Mitti
subTitle: Deva's sister is assaulted and murdered by a gangster. In an attempt to take revenge, he vows to kill everyone who was responsible for the henious act.

title: Astitva
subTitle: A wife's unexpected inheritance raises her husband's suspicions, revealing a secret that could threaten their relationship.

title: Powerful Game
subTitle: A man unravels the mysteries of his past and his upbringing while settling a village feud.

title: Kyo Kii Main Jhuth Nahin Bolta
subTitle: Raj is a lawyer who finds great success with his countless fibs. However, when his son wishes for his father to stop lying, Raj is magically forced to speak the truth, which lands him in trouble.

title: Sultaan
subTitle: Kabira helps Ayesha save her garage from goons, hiding his past as an honest inspector. However, Ayesha becomes determined to uncover why he changed.

title: Movie
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
